results.title: Suzie Bates: An era-defining legacy in numbers
results.description: Zealand's greatest-ever batter leaves behind a statistical legacy few can match

results.title: South Carolina's Alicia Tournebize celebrates mother's hall of fame basketball career
results.description: South Carolina women's basketball forward Alicia Tournebize got to switch things up and watch her mom celebrated at Women's Basketball Hall of Fame.

results.title: WATCH: Bill Clinton brushes off New York election setback: 'I think we're in good shape for the fall'
results.description: Former President Bill Clinton expressed confidence in Democrats' prospects after this week's New York election results before declining to answer a question about Iran. (Credit: Nicholas Ballasy for Fox News Digital)

results.title: Tuchel worried by right-back injuries, but Arsenal pair fully fit
results.description: England boss Thomas Tuchel has no concerns over the fitness of Bukayo Saka and Declan Rice, but an injury for Jarell Quansah has deepened the right-back crisis.

results.title: World Cup fever gives U.S. soccer fresh momentum
Colombia tops World Cup group after goalless draw with Portugal (updated)
Croatia defeat “weird” – Ayew criticises “sloppy” Black Stars
results.description: Black Stars captain Jordan Ayew has urged Ghanaians to remain confident in the national team despite Saturday's defeat to Croatia, insisting that the setback has not dampened the players' spirit as they prepare for the knockout stage of the ongoing FIFA World Cup 2026.

results.title: India sign off with four medals from Asia Cup Bridge Championships
results.description: Panaji: Host nation India concluded its campaign in the 5th Asia Cup Bridge Championships with an impressive haul of three silver and one bronze, underlining the country’s strong performance across...

results.title: Logan Webb Dominates as Giants Blank Braves to Even Series
results.description: Logan Webb continued his dominant June while Rafael Devers powered the offense with two home runs as the San Francisco Giants defeated the Atlanta Braves.

results.title: Colombia vs Portugal: How did a goalless draw send Colombia to the top of group K?
results.description: Colombia claimed top spot in Group K after a tense 0-0 draw with Portugal. A late disallowed goal denied victory, but the result secured a Round of 32 clash with Ghana as Portugal prepare to face Croatia.
